TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == kakiliman == anu sigang samengmeng han henay "saka tinusa" nikiliman hicanita ku kawaw? pawanen ku gang, manapicici' manapi pahelak paising amana pi huwa-liyaw. anu malingatu tu utiih kuudip sa, kya mikilim tu sapaselep tu adada kapah tu. anu mahini sa, kya lihalay apaledu tu nikaudip. anu cay sakamu ku ising sa, manapipalita tuising, anu cimacima sa cayamin katineng tu hacica tu kunikaudip. payawan u imelangay ugang haw u duma a imelang, ahican cay katalaising amukan tu sapaiyu'. u imelangay mihica pakunida sat u ising a muhicahica, u ising nayay ku situdung a mutudu tu imwlanga ahican ku nipaising. a minanm kuta tu baetu amukulikulin, u makulukuluday a baetu caay kasidamay . kahina latlat tu udip, u punu' kahina dateng, u udip cay tu katayi . sisa saydahen ku nipawayway , tudedemiad idaw ku namuh linges lalum lipahak , u "limaay a nikaadih, tengil, sanek, nutiyung" cay tu kahaymaw. Laliwnen ku cayay kalipahak a kawaw, kasaetim tu kaudip atu namuh. mahida u musaungayay tu lima atu kukuk, misaungay ku kaway, atu tangah, sakapah hanku wayway atu nikasaungay. kahinaculil, u idang muculil i udiudipan misaniyul, cay pahanhan i sasa nu udip, u culil nu idang matatungus tu. ha~ha~tawa han , miedap milatlat tu heci nuudip atu mibaladay a laat, muhanhan mangaleb ku ni picumud ilabu a kapah tu, u udiudipan caluway sat u. kahinakan tu asuay, kanamuh mikawaw tu kakakaydihan nu udip, kiyu hamaw sa manamuh, kya u udip muculil namin kuidang nu udip mabanaw tu nu tupan, nyhuday, pacakat tu namuh, anu mahini sa, nikaudip tanunamuh sat u. nikaydaan sa numaku, anu kapah lipahak ku nikaudip, tawalen ku cacanan akakawaw, u gang cay kapiladlad i udip. cay kasatedep sa wida kya u helak sananay a nikaudip, usakapahay a sapaekeng tu udiu ku mahiniay. ayda u gang mapatay iadaw ku mahiniay a kawaw, adihan mahida u kawaw nu taw, anu cila akay I udip nu mita. udip nu udip wisu mu matinengay wisu ku mulimuuday , ayda malingatu sakapahen ku nanam nikaudip, salihalay han maudip tu dedemiad, mahiniay sa sapipulu' tu gang sakapahay a nikaudip kuyni. datengen!ŚąáŤ®ė! u gang cayay kaw imelang ÁôĆÁóášłćśėĮÁóÖ! u gang namakay nu udip anu pisakapah, caay kaw nipaising kuni pakapah. u tademaw nayay ku pili', widasa u laluk atu kasic kucayay kalecad. .
S.PHON: == kakir~…ĺiman == anu sigaŇč sam…ôŇčm…ôŇč ńßan ńß…ônaj "saka tinusa" nikir~…ĺiman ńßi ¶anita ku kawaw? pawan…ôn ku gaŇč, manapi ¶i ¶i Ē~ ° manapi pańß…ôr~…ĺak paisiŇč amana pi ńßuwa-r~…ĺijaw. anu mar~…ĺiŇčatu tu utiińß kuudip sa, kja mikir~…ĺim tu sapas…ôr~…ĺ…ôp tu adada kapańß tu. anu mańßini sa, kja r~…ĺińßar~…ĺaj apar~…ĺ…ôdu tu nikaudip. anu ¶aj sakamu ku isiŇč sa, manapipar~…ĺita tuisiŇč, anu ¶ima ¶ima sa ¶ajamin katin…ôŇč tu ńßa ¶i ¶a tu kunikaudip. pajawan u im…ôr~…ĺaŇčaj ugaŇč ńßaw u duma a im…ôr~…ĺaŇč, ańßi ¶an ¶aj katar~…ĺaisiŇč amukan tu sapaiju Ē~ °. u im…ôr~…ĺaŇčaj mińßi ¶a pakunida sat u isiŇč a muńßi ¶ańßi ¶a, u isiŇč najaj ku situduŇč a mutudu tu imwr~…ĺaŇča ańßi ¶an ku nipaisiŇč. a minanm kuta tu ba…ôtu amukur~…ĺikur~…ĺin, u makur~…ĺukur~…ĺudaj a ba…ôtu ¶aaj kasidamaj . kańßina r~…ĺatr~…ĺat tu udip, u punu Ē~ ° kańßina dat…ôŇč, u udip ¶aj tu kataji . sisa sajdańß…ôn ku nipawajwaj , tud…ôd…ômiad idaw ku namuńß r~…ĺiŇč…ôs r~…ĺar~…ĺum r~…ĺipańßak , u "r~…ĺimaaj a nikaadińß, t…ôŇčir~…ĺ, san…ôk, nutijuŇč" ¶aj tu kańßajmaw. r~…ĺar~…ĺiwn…ôn ku ¶ajaj kar~…ĺipańßak a kawaw, kasa…ôtim tu kaudip atu namuńß. mańßida u musauŇčajaj tu r~…ĺima atu kukuk, misauŇčaj ku kawaj, atu taŇčańß, sakapańß ńßanku wajwaj atu nikasauŇčaj. kańßina ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ, u idaŇč mu ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ i udiudipan misanijur~…ĺ, ¶aj pańßanńßan i sasa nu udip, u ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ nu idaŇč matatuŇčus tu. ńßa~ńßa~tawa ńßan , mi…ôdap mir~…ĺatr~…ĺat tu ńß…ô ¶i nuudip atu mibar~…ĺadaj a r~…ĺaat, muńßanńßan maŇčar~…ĺ…ôb ku ni pi ¶umud ir~…ĺabu a kapańß tu, u udiudipan ¶ar~…ĺuwaj sat u. kańßinakan tu asuaj, kanamuńß mikawaw tu kakakajdińßan nu udip, kiju ńßamaw sa manamuńß, kja u udip mu ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ namin kuidaŇč nu udip mabanaw tu nu tupan, njńßudaj, pa ¶akat tu namuńß, anu mańßini sa, nikaudip tanunamuńß sat u. nikajdaan sa numaku, anu kapańß r~…ĺipańßak ku nikaudip, tawar~…ĺ…ôn ku ¶a ¶anan akakawaw, u gaŇč ¶aj kapir~…ĺadr~…ĺad i udip. ¶aj kasat…ôd…ôp sa wida kja u ńß…ôr~…ĺak sananaj a nikaudip, usakapańßaj a sapa…ôk…ôŇč tu udiu ku mańßiniaj. ajda u gaŇč mapataj iadaw ku mańßiniaj a kawaw, adińßan mańßida u kawaw nu taw, anu ¶ir~…ĺa akaj i udip nu mita. udip nu udip wisu mu matin…ôŇčaj wisu ku mur~…ĺimuudaj , ajda mar~…ĺiŇčatu sakapańß…ôn ku nanam nikaudip, sar~…ĺińßar~…ĺaj ńßan maudip tu d…ôd…ômiad, mańßiniaj sa sapipur~…ĺu Ē~ ° tu gaŇč sakapańßaj a nikaudip kujni. dat…ôŇč…ôn!**! u gaŇč ¶ajaj kaw im…ôr~…ĺaŇč *****! u gaŇč namakaj nu udip anu pisakapańß, ¶aaj kaw nipaisiŇč kuni pakapańß. u tad…ômaw najaj ku pir~…ĺi Ē~ °, widasa u r~…ĺar~…ĺuk atu kasi ¶ ku ¶ajaj kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad. .
S.FORM: == kakiliman == anu sigang samengmeng han henay "saka tinusa" nikiliman hicanita ku kawaw? pawanen ku gang, manapicici' manapi pahelak paising amana pi huwa-liyaw. anu malingatu tu utiih kuudip sa, kya mikilim tu sapaselep tu adada kapah tu. anu mahini sa, kya lihalay apaledu tu nikaudip. anu cay sakamu ku ising sa, manapipalita tuising, anu cimacima sa cayamin katineng tu hacica tu kunikaudip. payawan u imelangay ugang haw u duma a imelang, ahican cay katalaising amukan tu sapaiyu'. u imelangay mihica pakunida sat u ising a muhicahica, u ising nayay ku situdung a mutudu tu imwlanga ahican ku nipaising. a minanm kuta tu baetu amukulikulin, u makulukuluday a baetu caay kasidamay . kahina latlat tu udip, u punu' kahina dateng, u udip cay tu katayi . sisa saydahen ku nipawayway , tudedemiad idaw ku namuh linges lalum lipahak , u "limaay a nikaadih, tengil, sanek, nutiyung" cay tu kahaymaw. Laliwnen ku cayay kalipahak a kawaw, kasaetim tu kaudip atu namuh. mahida u musaungayay tu lima atu kukuk, misaungay ku kaway, atu tangah, sakapah hanku wayway atu nikasaungay. kahinaculil, u idang muculil i udiudipan misaniyul, cay pahanhan i sasa nu udip, u culil nu idang matatungus tu. ha~ha~tawa han , miedap milatlat tu heci nuudip atu mibaladay a laat, muhanhan mangaleb ku ni picumud ilabu a kapah tu, u udiudipan caluway sat u. kahinakan tu asuay, kanamuh mikawaw tu kakakaydihan nu udip, kiyu hamaw sa manamuh, kya u udip muculil namin kuidang nu udip mabanaw tu nu tupan, nyhuday, pacakat tu namuh, anu mahini sa, nikaudip tanunamuh sat u. nikaydaan sa numaku, anu kapah lipahak ku nikaudip, tawalen ku cacanan akakawaw, u gang cay kapiladlad i udip. cay kasatedep sa wida kya u helak sananay a nikaudip, usakapahay a sapaekeng tu udiu ku mahiniay. ayda u gang mapatay iadaw ku mahiniay a kawaw, adihan mahida u kawaw nu taw, anu cila akay I udip nu mita. udip nu udip wisu mu matinengay wisu ku mulimuuday , ayda malingatu sakapahen ku nanam nikaudip, salihalay han maudip tu dedemiad, mahiniay sa sapipulu' tu gang sakapahay a nikaudip kuyni. datengen!ŚąáŤ®ė! u gang cayay kaw imelang ÁôĆÁóášłćśėĮÁóÖ! u gang namakay nu udip anu pisakapah, caay kaw nipaising kuni pakapah. u tademaw nayay ku pili', widasa u laluk atu kasic kucayay kalecad. .
S.PHON: == kakir~…ĺiman == anu sigaŇč sam…ôŇčm…ôŇč ńßan ńß…ônaj "saka tinusa" nikir~…ĺiman ńßi ¶anita ku kawaw? pawan…ôn ku gaŇč, manapi ¶i ¶i Ē~ ° manapi pańß…ôr~…ĺak paisiŇč amana pi ńßuwa-r~…ĺijaw. anu mar~…ĺiŇčatu tu utiińß kuudip sa, kja mikir~…ĺim tu sapas…ôr~…ĺ…ôp tu adada kapańß tu. anu mańßini sa, kja r~…ĺińßar~…ĺaj apar~…ĺ…ôdu tu nikaudip. anu ¶aj sakamu ku isiŇč sa, manapipar~…ĺita tuisiŇč, anu ¶ima ¶ima sa ¶ajamin katin…ôŇč tu ńßa ¶i ¶a tu kunikaudip. pajawan u im…ôr~…ĺaŇčaj ugaŇč ńßaw u duma a im…ôr~…ĺaŇč, ańßi ¶an ¶aj katar~…ĺaisiŇč amukan tu sapaiju Ē~ °. u im…ôr~…ĺaŇčaj mińßi ¶a pakunida sat u isiŇč a muńßi ¶ańßi ¶a, u isiŇč najaj ku situduŇč a mutudu tu imwr~…ĺaŇča ańßi ¶an ku nipaisiŇč. a minanm kuta tu ba…ôtu amukur~…ĺikur~…ĺin, u makur~…ĺukur~…ĺudaj a ba…ôtu ¶aaj kasidamaj . kańßina r~…ĺatr~…ĺat tu udip, u punu Ē~ ° kańßina dat…ôŇč, u udip ¶aj tu kataji . sisa sajdańß…ôn ku nipawajwaj , tud…ôd…ômiad idaw ku namuńß r~…ĺiŇč…ôs r~…ĺar~…ĺum r~…ĺipańßak , u "r~…ĺimaaj a nikaadińß, t…ôŇčir~…ĺ, san…ôk, nutijuŇč" ¶aj tu kańßajmaw. r~…ĺar~…ĺiwn…ôn ku ¶ajaj kar~…ĺipańßak a kawaw, kasa…ôtim tu kaudip atu namuńß. mańßida u musauŇčajaj tu r~…ĺima atu kukuk, misauŇčaj ku kawaj, atu taŇčańß, sakapańß ńßanku wajwaj atu nikasauŇčaj. kańßina ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ, u idaŇč mu ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ i udiudipan misanijur~…ĺ, ¶aj pańßanńßan i sasa nu udip, u ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ nu idaŇč matatuŇčus tu. ńßa~ńßa~tawa ńßan , mi…ôdap mir~…ĺatr~…ĺat tu ńß…ô ¶i nuudip atu mibar~…ĺadaj a r~…ĺaat, muńßanńßan maŇčar~…ĺ…ôb ku ni pi ¶umud ir~…ĺabu a kapańß tu, u udiudipan ¶ar~…ĺuwaj sat u. kańßinakan tu asuaj, kanamuńß mikawaw tu kakakajdińßan nu udip, kiju ńßamaw sa manamuńß, kja u udip mu ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ namin kuidaŇč nu udip mabanaw tu nu tupan, njńßudaj, pa ¶akat tu namuńß, anu mańßini sa, nikaudip tanunamuńß sat u. nikajdaan sa numaku, anu kapańß r~…ĺipańßak ku nikaudip, tawar~…ĺ…ôn ku ¶a ¶anan akakawaw, u gaŇč ¶aj kapir~…ĺadr~…ĺad i udip. ¶aj kasat…ôd…ôp sa wida kja u ńß…ôr~…ĺak sananaj a nikaudip, usakapańßaj a sapa…ôk…ôŇč tu udiu ku mańßiniaj. ajda u gaŇč mapataj iadaw ku mańßiniaj a kawaw, adińßan mańßida u kawaw nu taw, anu ¶ir~…ĺa akaj i udip nu mita. udip nu udip wisu mu matin…ôŇčaj wisu ku mur~…ĺimuudaj , ajda mar~…ĺiŇčatu sakapańß…ôn ku nanam nikaudip, sar~…ĺińßar~…ĺaj ńßan maudip tu d…ôd…ômiad, mańßiniaj sa sapipur~…ĺu Ē~ ° tu gaŇč sakapańßaj a nikaudip kujni. dat…ôŇč…ôn!**! u gaŇč ¶ajaj kaw im…ôr~…ĺaŇč *****! u gaŇč namakaj nu udip anu pisakapańß, ¶aaj kaw nipaisiŇč kuni pakapańß. u tad…ômaw najaj ku pir~…ĺi Ē~ °, widasa u r~…ĺar~…ĺuk atu kasi ¶ ku ¶ajaj kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad. .
